title: Surgeon Vacancy at Piramal Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Piramal Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!
